title: Resilience
description: welcome to Resilience its a modpack based on another modpack i made a long time ago and didn't upload it but this is basically the 1.20.1 version of this with alot of cool features like artifacts items blocks biomes and so much more
body:
- ![This is the logo of Resilience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f7421ff6008f7f04fd1766ce6685fb4c9a27e43.png)
________________________________________________________________________________________________
**Features**

-New weapons

-Temperature system

-A bunch of new biomes

-New bosses

-Overhauled end

-Overhauled nether

-Overhauled creepers

-Overhauled endermen

-New blocks

-Artifacts

-Unique ways to interact with blocks

-Better ui sounds

-Better ambience

-Mobs from mob votes

-Sleeping bags and other camping stuff

-Better player animations

-Diagonal fences, walls and windows

-New dungeons

-Not that grat performance

-Changed progression

-Make anything a boat

-Cameras

-Amazing visuals

-Seasons

-New main menu

-Grappling hook

-Grave stones

-Better structures

-Airplanes

-Instruments

-Weathering system

-Baking

-Brewery

-Candelight

-Overhauled villages

-More music discs

-Overhauled spiders

-Falling trees

-Water splashes

-More armor

-Furniture

-Magic

-Backpacks

-Capybaras

-More cave biomes

-Immersive music

-Terraria inspired tireing system

-Better visuals

-New death screen

-And SO MUCH MORE
________________________________________________________________________________________________
If you like modpacks that completely changes the game this is the modpack for you... or not idk.
